mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_COUPON_REDEEM_CODE (ID, CODE, BATCH_ID, TEMPLATE_ID, STATUS, FAIL_COUNT, EXPIRE_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, DELETED) VALUES (#{item.id}, #{item.code}, #{item.batchId}, #{item.templateId}, 0, 0, #{item.expireTime}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, 0)
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
